iniMenu.description: Test your luck and strategy. Try to get as close to 21 as possible without going over.

selectGameMenu.title: Select Game
selectGameMenu.description: Choose a game to play and have fun!

Login.title: Login
Login.description: Enter your email below to log in to your account.

UpdatePassword.title: Reset Your Password
UpdatePassword.description: Please enter your new password below.

ForgotPassword.title: Reset Your Password
ForgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
ForgotPassword.emailSentDescription: If you registered using your email and password, you will receive a password reset email.

SignUpSuccess.title: Thank you for signing up!
SignUpSuccess.description: Check your email to confirm your account.
SignUpSuccess.content: You've successfully signed up. Please check your email and confirm your account before signing in.

HowToPlay.title: How to Play
HowToPlay.objectiveDescription: The objective of the game is to achieve a hand value as close to 21 as possible without exceeding it.
HowToPlay.rule1: Players begin with two cards and can choose to hit (draw another card) or stand (keep their current hand).
HowToPlay.rule2: Face cards are worth 10 points, aces can be worth 1 or 11 points, and all other cards are worth their face value.
HowToPlay.rule3: If a player's hand exceeds 21, they bust and lose the round.
HowToPlay.rule4: You gain points based on the value of your hand and cards taken.
HowToPlay.rule5: The maximum score you can obtain is 110 (perfect round).
HowToPlay.rule6: A perfect round is achieved by getting 21 with only 2 cards.
HowToPlay.hitDescription: Draw another card to increase your hand value.
HowToPlay.endRoundDescription: Keep your current hand and end your turn.
HowToPlay.restartDescription: Reset the game and start a new game.
HowToPlay.exitDescription: Exit the current game and return to the main menu.
HowToPlay.scoreDescription: You can see your current score and the number of rounds played at the top of the screen.
HowToPlay.playerHandDescription: You can see your current hand and the total value of the cards in it.
